prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny feature workflow without waiting for more user input. Use @a to sketch the implementation approach first, then implement a weighted-average helper in calculator.py using the standard formula sum(value * weight) / sum(weights), add or update tests, delegate verification planning and pytest coverage to @t instead of doing that role inline yourself, use @cr for a review pass, update README.md, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, architect, tester, and reviewer roles
The weighted-average helper is implemented with tests
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
